title: Solar Context Store
description: Schema for the context store: project packets, task packets, memory packets, and task envelopes. Context is always external to long-lived tmux panes to prevent stale state.

packet_type.description: project: long-lived project context; task: per-sprint-node ephemeral context; memory: compressed/summarized long-term memory.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 expiry. Null means no expiry (project/memory packets). Task packets should set this.

project_id.description: Parent project id. Required for task and memory packets.

node_id.description: DAG node id for task packets.

actor_id.description: Actor that owns this context packet.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of this packet's content.

content.description: Packet payload. Structure varies by packet_type.

token_estimate.description: Estimated token count of this packet's content.

compression_level.description: How much this packet has been compressed from the original context.

parent_packet_id.description: Reference to the packet this was compressed/derived from.

task_envelope.description: A dispatched task envelope binding a task to an actor. Critical tasks MUST include a context_packet_ref or embedded context_packet.

envelope_id.description: Unique envelope id for this dispatch event.

task_id.description: Reference to the DAG node task being dispatched.

logical_operator.description: Logical operator type used for routing.

criticality.description: Task criticality level. critical tasks require context_packet_ref or context_packet.

context_packet_ref.description: Reference to the active context packet for this task.

context_packet.description: Embedded context packet (alternative to context_packet_ref for small packets).

evidence_ledger_ref.description: Reference to the evidence ledger directory for audit.
